title: pelargonium × saturatum
intro: Pelargonium × saturatum is a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant, commonly known as a type of geranium. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of geraniol and linalool, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × saturatum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and sore throat treatment, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
